form.formComment: Jake Capewell trained three-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Dam was a winner of four races. Effortless trial winner. No surprise to see him feature.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when struggled in the run home; 5th of 7 at Eagle Farm 3yo Mdn on October 1 over 1000m, 7 len behind Seismic Boom carrying 57kg at $5. Expecting him to hit the ground running this campaign.

Second-up 2nd of 9 at Ipswich 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 800m, on a slow track; neck behind Worthy with 56kg at $2.50. Leading prospect.

On debut third of 7 at Gympie 2yo+ Mdn-Sw November 22 over 850m, 12 len behind Pride Of Nashville with 56kg at $4.60. Looking elsewhere.
